---
title: "ibot_cross_entropy"
generated: true
description: "Masked-token self-distillation cross-entropy (iBOT)."
---

[тА╣ back to `nitrix.metrics.contrastive`](../nitrix-metrics-contrastive.qmd)

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:ibot_cross_entropy -->
```python
ibot_cross_entropy(student_logits: Float[Array, 'b t k'], teacher_logits: Float[Array, 'b t k'], center: Float[Array, 'k'], mask: Bool[Array, 'b t'], *, student_temp: float = 0.1, teacher_temp: float = 0.04, reduction: Reduction = 'mean') -> Float[Array, '...']
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:ibot_cross_entropy -->
Masked-token self-distillation cross-entropy (iBOT).

Exactly [`dino_cross_entropy`](../nitrix-metrics-contrastive/dino_cross_entropy.qmd)'s centred/sharpened cross-entropy
evaluated per patch token, then **domain-mask reduced** over the masked
tokens of each sample: the per-sample score is the
$\sum(\text{mask} \cdot \text{ce}) / \sum(\text{mask})$ weighted
mean over the token axis (the masked token is the measurement domain), and
the result is reduced over the batch.  An all-unmasked sample contributes
0.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:ibot_cross_entropy -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|------------|--------|--------|----------|--------------------------------------------------------------|
| `student_logits` | `Float` | `b` ├Ч `t` ├Ч `k` | тАФ | Per-token prototype scores `(batch, tokens, k)`. |
| `teacher_logits` | `Float` | `b` ├Ч `t` ├Ч `k` | тАФ | Per-token prototype scores `(batch, tokens, k)`. |
| `center` | `Float` | `k` | тАФ | Teacher centring vector `(k,)`. |
| `mask` | `Bool` | `b` ├Ч `t` | тАФ | Boolean `(batch, tokens)`; `True` marks the masked tokens the loss is computed on. |
| `student_temp` | `float` | тАФ | `0.1` | Softmax temperatures. |
| `teacher_temp` | `float` | тАФ | `0.04` | Softmax temperatures. |
| `reduction` | `Reduction` | тАФ | `'mean'` | `"mean"` (default), `"sum"`, or `"none"` (per-sample CE). |

**Returns** `Float` тАФ shape `...`. The masked-token self-distillation cross-entropy. With `reduction="none"` this is the per-sample mask-weighted mean of shape `(batch,)`; with `"mean"` or `"sum"` it is a scalar reducing over the batch.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->


<!-- nitrix:gen dims:ibot_cross_entropy -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `b` | *(undocumented тАФ add to `_dimensions.yml`)* |
| `t` | *(undocumented тАФ add to `_dimensions.yml`)* |
| `k` | kernel or basis components |
| `...` | anonymous leading (batch) axes |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
